name: NTR World | RPG
description:
Welcome to a world filled with intense emotions, hidden desires, and strained relationships. Here, you have the freedom to be whoever you want in a setting filled with infidelity, betrayal, and passion. The game is based on the concept of NTR (Netorare), where power and loyalty dynamics are tested in every interaction.

Your character may end up betraying their partner, or perhaps they become the target of another. No matter what role you decide to play, the important thing is that each decision will have consequences. Will you give in to temptation and hold on to your relationship? Or will you be the one to break someone else's heart?
creator: ParrotMilk
